link_meta.page_title: Striim RSVP - Pre Day at Google NEXT
link_meta.page_excerpt: Striim RSVP - Pre Day at Google NEXT --> --> Press start before Google Next kicks off. Day Zero: Data Origins Tuesday, April 21st | 10:00am - 6:00pm | Las Vegas Coffee • Lunch on us • Get Striim certified • Giveaways • Happy hour Before the main quest begins, drop into Day Zero: Data Origins —start with coffee, have lunch on us, and dive into a low-pressure, builder-focused space with real conversations and real-time solutions. Free Play Mode | Drop in anytime Unlock achievements by getting Striim certified, grab a limited-edition t-shirt, and speed-run building AI pipelines in minutes—no heavy lift required. 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM | Spawn Point: Coffee + Arrival Ease in with coffee, snacks, and a comfortable place to land while you wait for hotel check-in or connect with early arrivals. 12:00 PM – 2:00 PM | Power-Up Lunch: Live Build Session Fuel up while diving into hands-on demos—build a real-time pipeline, validate data in-flight, and see how AI-ready data comes together in minutes. 2

link_meta.page_title: Google Next 2026 Happy Hour with Promevo, gPanel, CloudM & JumpCloud
link_meta.page_excerpt: Join Promevo, gPanel, CloudM, and JumpCloud for a happy hour at Google Cloud Next 2026 on April 21. Reserve your spot now for networking and refreshments. Google Next 2026 Happy Hour with Promevo, gPanel, CloudM & JumpCloud RSVP for Our Happy Hour at Google Next 2026! NOTICE: This event is currently at capacity and a waitlist is in place. Priority access will still be given to partners and clients, however. P romevo, gPanel, CloudM, and JumpCloud are thrilled to invite 2026 Google Cloud Next attendees to an exclusive happy hour event on Tuesday, April 21, 2026 from 6:30 to 8:30pm PDT. Join us at Libertine Social in the Mandalay Bay Convention Center to enjoy complimentary refreshments and network with other Google users and enthusiasts. Don't miss out on this fantastic chance to enhance your Google Cloud Next experience with the Promevo, gPanel, CloudM, and JumpCloud teams! If you plan on bringing colleagues with you, send them this form so they can RSVP. The Details When: Tuesday, Apr

link_meta.page_title: Google Next AI Roundtable
link_meta.page_excerpt: Google Next AI Roundtable --> Pull up a seat and join our cloud experts for an AI Roundtable with Striim, Dagster and Google! AI cannot exist in silos. Truly successful and scalable AI initiatives depend on how models, data and infrastructure interact beyond the walls of one company to build an emerging ecosystem of technologies and partners. This exclusive live Lunch & Learn brings together leaders from Google, Striim, Dagster and more to explore how each layer of the AI world—data movement, compute, models and applications—shapes the others. Attendees will learn: • How the AI “stack” is evolving into a connected ecosystem spanning data, infrastructure and intelligence • Where interoperability challenges emerge between data pipelines, models and applications • How organizations are balancing openness, trust and control as AI becomes operational • What the next generation of adaptive, collaborative AI systems could look like Space is limited – RSVP today! RSVP Striim Cloud Striim Platf

link_meta.page_title: Google Cloud Next 2026 Closing Reception – Fortinet
link_meta.page_excerpt: Google Cloud Next 2026 Closing Reception – Fortinet ENG ES POR Seguridad para avanzar en la nube En la Fórmula 1, la velocidad es protagonista. Pero lo que permite competir al más alto nivel es la seguridad. Los equipos pueden asumir riesgos, innovar y empujar los límites porque existe una base sólida de ingeniería, control y protocolos de seguridad. En la nube ocurre lo mismo. La innovación exige avanzar. Los negocios exigen resultados . La seguridad es lo que permite gestionar el riesgo y proteger el crecimiento. F1 Arcade Las Vegas será el escenario para compartir esta idea en una experiencia donde tecnología, comunidad y energía se encuentran. El cierre de Google Cloud Next 2026 Fortinet invita a su comunidad de clientes de Latinoamérica a cerrar Google Cloud Next 2026 con una experiencia donde la innovación, la nube y la seguridad se encuentran.
